faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Pet Movie AI
faq.tip: Still have questions? Contact our support team

items.question: How does Pet Movie AI work?
items.answer: Simply upload 1 photos or videos of your pet. Our AI analyzes the content, creates a storyboard, adds music, transitions, and effects. In 5-10 minutes, you'll have a cinematic 4K movie ready to download and share.

items.question: What video formats are supported?
items.answer: We support JPG, PNG for photos and MP4, MOV, AVI for videos. Maximum file size is 500MB per upload. You can upload up to 100 files per movie project.

items.question: Can I choose the music and style?
items.answer: Yes! We offer 20+ story templates including Adventure, Daily Life, Birthday Party, Memorial Tribute, and more. Each template has multiple music options. You can also upload your own music.

items.question: How long does processing take?
items.answer: Most movies are ready in 5-10 minutes depending on the number of files and selected video length. You'll receive a notification when your movie is ready to preview and download.

items.question: What's included in the free beta trial?
items.answer: During beta testing, new users receive 5 free credits (good for 1 free video generation) upon sign-up. This is a one-time trial with no time limit. Paid plans will be available after beta testing concludes.

items.question: Can I edit the movie after AI generates it?
items.answer: Yes! You can re-order clips, change music, adjust text overlays, and regenerate specific sections. Our editor is designed to be simple yet powerful, no video editing experience needed.
